  {
    "idea": "Weekly surge in Google Trends searches for 'home improvement loan' signals consumer stress lifting XLY",
    "family": "consumer_stress",
    "data": {
      "source": "Google Trends weekly search interest",
      "type": "api",
      "frequency": "weekly",
      "stable": true
    },
    "behavior": "Rising interest in home improvement loans often signals increased consumer willingness to spend on discretionary housing-related retail items.",
    "market_impact": {
      "direction": "bullish",
      "sector": "XLY",
      "rationale": "Increased loan interest suggests consumer confidence in discretionary home-related spending."
    },
    "trade_logic": {
      "entry": "If weekly search volume for 'home improvement loan' rises by more than 15% week-over-week",
      "exit": "Exit after 3 weeks or if search volume declines for 2 consecutive weeks",
      "expected_frequency": "medium"
    },
    "expected_fire_rate": "weekly",
    "historical_backfill": true,
    "minimum_history_months": 12,
    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "medium",
    "reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days": "Google Trends weekly data frequently shows >15% spikes in consumer loan interest seasonally and with credit cycles."
  },
